gamelift.gamesessionqueue.playerlatencyp: The queue setting that determines the highest latency allowed for individual players when placing a game session. When a latency policy is in force, a game session cannot be placed with any fleet in a Region where a player reports latency higher than the cap. Latency policies are only enforced when the placement request contains player latency information.

gamelift.gamesessionqueue.playerlatencyp.Description: The maximum latency value that is allowed for any player, in milliseconds. All policies must have a value set for this property.
The length of time, in seconds, that the policy is enforced while placing a new game session. A null value for this property means that the policy is enforced until the queue times out.
